reasoning: The baseline for “Strategic developments” in Belarus requires about 12 events per month on average. To reach ten times the threshold (1 + 30-day average over 360 days), the 30-day windows would have to see roughly 116 separate strategic development events. Even accounting for potential future volatility like the upcoming Zapad-2025 military drill involving 13,000 Russian troops or anniversary protests, achieving ~116 discretely coded ACLED strategic development events (which generally aggregate multiple local activities into single events) in just 30 days is extremely improbable without an unprecedented catastrophe like direct entry into the Ukraine war or a massive nationwide insurrection. There are currently no indicators pointing to such an escalation in the coming weeks or months. Probabilities are kept very low but slightly increase for later dates to account for the growing uncertainty horizon.
